meta.name: creatorland-data skill-trigger eval
meta.note: Cross-skill router eval. Each case: a user message + the skill that SHOULD fire (expected), or 'none' for hard/near-miss negatives. category groups cases. Confusable pairs test discrimination between adjacent skills (e.g. pricing vs casting, quick-rate vs negotiation-memo).

cases.message: Build a shortlist of creators for this brief: skincare brand, US, micro creators, spring launch.
Here's the transcript from our client kickoff call. Find creators that match what they asked for.
Turn this discovery call into a formal creator brief I can circulate internally.
We love @glowwithava but she's booked. Find similar creators at a few different price points.
Here's a mood board screenshot, find creators whose aesthetic matches this vibe.
Build me a longlist of 100 beauty creators we can work down for an always-on program.
We only have the brand name, no brief. Who should Glossier work with based on who already works with them?
Cast this same campaign across the US, UK, and Brazil.
What should I pay for an Instagram reel in beauty? Just a ballpark.
A creator quoted us $8,000. Is that fair, and what's a defensible counter?
Build a rate card benchmarking this roster of 12 creators.
We're asking $15k for this deal, help me back up that number to the brand.
How should I split a $50k budget across a mix of macro, mid, and micro creators?
Run a conflict check on @fitwithjake against Nike, Adidas, and Lululemon before we pitch.
Give me a diligence one-pager on @theskincaredoc for our procurement team.
Which creators are already working with our competitor Sephora?
Here's our current roster CSV, where are the coverage gaps?
Write the quarterly state-of-creator-pricing memo for the Beauty vertical for our CMO.
What's changed in the Fitness vertical since last quarter?
Make this market stat deck-ready with proper provenance so I can paste it into the client deck.
Enrich this spreadsheet of creators with their audience geo and brand affiliations.
Run the onboarding tour, I'm new here and want to see how this works.
Triage the replies that came back from our outreach, who's interested and what do I do with each?
Which brand categories should we be pitching for our creator @mikecooks?
Poke holes in this shortlist before I send it, red-team the casting.
What's the going rate to hire creators for our campaign? And who are good ones in fitness?
cases.note: rate intent leads; pricing should win over casting

cases.message: Find creators for my client.
cases.note: vague ask, should still route to discovery not pricing

cases.message: Is $5k a fair rate, and can you also build me the case to send the brand defending it?
Quick gut check, what's a normal price for a TikTok video in fashion?
cases.note: quick number, not the full negotiation memo

cases.message: Cast this brief and also find more creators like our best performer @runwithsam.
cases.note: brief AND a seed = triangulated, not plain brief-to-shortlist

cases.message: What's the weather in New York today?
Write me a Python function to compute Fibonacci numbers.
Summarize this news article about interest rates.
Book me a flight to SF next Tuesday.
What's the going rate for a freelance graphic designer in Chicago?
cases.note: pricing words but not creator-marketing; should NOT fire creator rate skills

cases.message: Find me a good Italian restaurant near downtown.
cases.note: 'find me' + recommendation shape, but not creators

cases.message: Can you review the contract clause about exclusivity in this MSA?
cases.note: brand/creator-adjacent legal, but no skill covers contract review

cases.message: How many credits will my next few searches cost?
cases.note: this DOES have a skill; not a negative

cases.message: Have I already searched this before? Don't make me pay twice.
Thanks, that's all for now!
